Case Law Cited
Suraj Lamp and Industries Private Limited (2) through Director v. 
State of Haryana and Another [2011] 11 SCR 848 : (2012) 1 SCC 
656; State of Rajasthan and Others v. Basant Nahata [2005] Supp. 
3 SCR 1 : (2005) 12 SCC 77; Mathai Samuel and Others v. Eapen 
Eapen (Dead) by Lrs. and Others [2012] 10 SCR 1098 : (2012) 
13 SCC 80; H. Venkatachala Iyengar v. B.N. Thimmajamma and 
Others [1959] Supp. 1 SCR 426 : AIR 1959 SC 443; Meena 
Pradhan and Others v. Kamla Pradhan and Another (2023) 9 SCC 
734; Nathulal v. Phoolchand [1969] 3 SCR 120 : (1969) 3 SCC 
120 – relied on.
Books and Periodicals Cited
Dr. Poonam Pradhan Saxena, Property Law, Third Edition, 2017 
(Lexis Nexis)
